title: Comparing Your Real Options for Solutions When PayPal and Stripe Ban Your Account
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're a Nigerian digital creator with a great product, but PayPal and Stripe shut down your account, citing 'geographic restrictions.' You're not alone. Many countries are restricted from using these payment processors, and it's not just a coincidence. It's a deliberate strategy to exclude certain markets and avoid regulatory hassles. You're left with no clear way to sell your digital products, ebooks, courses, or software to your customers. You've tried other options, but they either charge exorbitant fees or require you to jump through hoops to get paid. It's time to explore alternative solutions that actually work for creators like you.
What Each Option Actually Offers

When you're looking for alternatives to PayPal and Stripe, you'll find a range of solutions that promise to help you get paid. Some options, like Gumroad and Payhip, offer a simple way to sell digital products, but they often come with high fees and restrictive terms. Others, like NOWPayments, provide a more flexible payment system, but may require you to set up a separate account. Meanwhile, Web3 Wallet Connect offers a unique solution that integrates with cryptocurrency wallets, allowing customers to buy and download your products directly without any intermediaries. It's a more complex setup, but it offers greater control and flexibility for creators like you.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

When it comes to restricted countries, some payment processors will simply shut down your account without warning. Others may offer a 'workaround' that involves using a separate account or payment method. However, these solutions often come with high fees or other restrictions that can eat into your profits. Web3 Wallet Connect, on the other hand, is designed to work with cryptocurrency wallets, which are available to users in many restricted countries. This means you can sell your products to customers in these countries without worrying about your account being shut down.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When you're choosing a payment processor, it's essential to consider the payment speed, fees, and real costs involved. Some options may promise fast payment processing, but may charge exorbitant fees for the privilege. Others may offer lower fees, but may take longer to process payments. Web3 Wallet Connect, on the other hand, offers fast payment processing and competitive fees, making it an attractive option for creators who want to maximize their profits.
Don't be fooled by payment processors that promise 'zero fees' – they often have hidden costs or restrictions that can eat into your profits.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

As a digital creator, you want to be able to automate your sales and delivery process as much as possible. This means setting up a system that can handle sales, process payments, and deliver digital products to customers without any manual intervention. Web3 Wallet Connect offers a range of automation tools and integrations that make it easy to set up a seamless sales and delivery process. With its integrated wallet system, you can even offer customers the option to buy and download your products directly from your website.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

So, which option is right for you? If you're looking for a simple way to sell digital products and don't mind the fees, Gumroad or Payhip might be a good choice. However, if you want more control and flexibility, and are willing to set up a more complex system, Web3 Wallet Connect is worth considering. With its integrated wallet system and competitive fees, it offers a unique solution for creators who want to maximize their profits and reach customers in restricted countries.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The most common question I get from creators is 'Will I get paid on time?' The answer is yes. With Web3 Wallet Connect, you can set up a seamless sales and delivery process that automates payments and delivery. Once you've set up your account and integrated your wallet, you can sell products and get paid in real-time, without any intermediaries or delays.
Web3 Wallet Connect is not just a payment processor – it's a full-fledged sales and delivery platform that integrates with cryptocurrency wallets.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're interested in exploring more payment solutions, check out our guide to cryptocurrency wallets and payment processors. You can also learn more about Web3 Wallet Connect and its features by visiting our GitHub page. As a creator, you have a range of options available to you, and it's worth exploring different solutions to find the one that works best for you.
Your Action Checklist

To get started with Web3 Wallet Connect, follow these steps: 1. Sign up for a Web3 Wallet Connect account and set up your wallet. 2. Integrate your wallet with your website or sales platform. 3. Set up your sales process and automate delivery. 4. Test your system to ensure everything is working smoothly. 5. Start selling and getting paid! By following these steps, you can take your first step towards selling digital products and reaching customers in restricted countries.
By using Web3 Wallet Connect, you can avoid the hassle and expense of setting up a separate payment account or using a workaround to sell to customers in restricted countries.
